title: Blink Charging Q4 2023 Earnings Results Analysis
text: Blink Charging Q4 2023 Earnings Results. Company: Blink Charging NASDAQ BLNK. Key Metrics: EPS: -$0.28 per share beating estimate of -$0.31, Revenue: $42.71 million exceeded expectations by approximately 20%, Analyst Estimate: $35.64 million in revenue. Performance Summary: Blink Charging surpassed Wall Street expectations on both fronts during its fourth-quarter 2023 reporting. The company reported earnings per share of -28 cents, above the analyst estimate for EPS of -31 cents, indicating a smaller loss than anticipated. On the revenue side, the outperformance was more pronounced, with actual results 19.84% better than the analyst estimate. Full Year 2023: Blink Charging announces record-breaking fourth-quarter 2023 revenue exceeding $42 million and full-year 2023 revenue surpassing $140 million. The strong Q4 performance demonstrates the company's ability to scale operations and improve financial efficiency.
